metadata.name: Manufacturing demo KG v3
metadata.description: DEMO ONLY - minimal illustrative v3 KG for the SKI Framework reference implementation. NOT a production compliance KG (OSHA general industry (illustrative) references are illustrative). Two rules with typed obligations, jurisdictional scope, effective-date intervals, and citations.

subjects.name: Workplace noise exposure
subjects.description: 8-hour time-weighted-average noise exposure on the production floor.

subjects.name: Machine guarding
subjects.description: Count of guard-disengaged events on running machinery per shift.

rules.name: Noise exposure limit
rules.description: Demo rule: 8h TWA noise exposure must not exceed 85 dBA.

rules.name: Machine guarding required
rules.description: Demo rule: no guard-disengaged events on running machinery.

obligations.summary: 8-hour TWA noise exposure must not exceed 85 dBA.
Guard-disengaged events on running machinery must not exceed 0.

citations.source_document: Demo - illustrative reference to OSHA 29 CFR 1910.95 (NOT a real legal citation)
Demo - illustrative reference to OSHA 29 CFR 1910.212 (NOT a real legal citation)
